channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Kotlin (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Kotlin nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 ZethRise/Aethery (207 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ZethRise

📝 Repository: ZethRise/Aethery

📄 Descrizione: One-click mobile GUI for the Aether censorship-circumvention tunnel — Kotlin & Rust

⭐ Stelle: 207

🍴 Forks: 9

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: aether android censorship gui kotlin mobile-app rust

📜 Licenza: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-07-15T16:30:13Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-21T04:56:24Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 risa-labs-inc/BossConsole (169 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: risa-labs-inc

📝 Repository: risa-labs-inc/BossConsole

📄 Descrizione: Open-source, multi-platform harness for AI agents — a native, multi-threaded operator's console (JVM, not Electron) to run Claude Code, Codex, Gemini or OpenCode with a real browser, terminal, editor, secrets & 100+ MCP tools. Built for enterprises, science & research.

⭐ Stelle: 169

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: agent-harness ai-agents browser claude-code codex compose-multiplatform desktop-app gemini hot-reload jvm kotlin-multiplatform llm mcp model-context-protocol multithreading open-source opencode rbac terminal

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-07-21T01:01:05Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-24T04:53:08Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 jjrodcast/TextKit (14 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: jjrodcast

📝 Repository: jjrodcast/TextKit

📄 Descrizione: A rich text editor engine for Compose Multiplatform, targeting Android, iOS, Web (Wasm/JS), and Desktop (JVM). Built on a rope-backed piece-table architecture for efficient O(log n) text editing, it supports formatting (bold, italic, underline, strikethrough, highlight), links, colors, headings, ordered/bullet/task lists, and blockquotes.

⭐ Stelle: 14

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: compose-multiplatform rich-text-editor

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-07-12T19:21:56Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-18T03:43:24Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
